components.description: creator_profiles table — stores creator identity, handle, bio, avatar, IE score cache
listings table — stores listing content, slug, status (draft|published), creator FK
listing_index table — published listing feed index, append-only, sorted by published_at
IE fetch and cache layer — GET score from INFLUENCE_ENGINE_URL, cache in creator_profiles, TTL 3600s
Slug generation and uniqueness enforcement — kebab-case from title, collision suffix -2/-3/etc, unique per creator
sb_token validation via SOULBOLT API — POST to SOULBOLT_API_URL/auth/validate, returns soulbolt_account_id on 200
